title: Single cell imaging-based chromatin biomarkers for tumor progression.
author: Venkatachalapathy S Jokhun DS Andhari M Shivashankar GV
content: S-EPMC8630115 PMC8630115 Single cell imaging-based chromatin biomarkers for tumor progression. Tumour progression within the tissue microenvironment is accompanied by complex biomechanical alterations of the extracellular environment.
